Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a low HDL cholesterol (29.2 mg/dL), which may increase cardiovascular risk. Glycemic, renal, and electrolyte parameters are stable. Lipid profile otherwise unremarkable. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of interventions to improve HDL if appropriate.
